items.title: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds
items.summary: Nearly 1 million people have lost a total of $3.8 billion after buying President Donald Trump’s $TRUMP memecoin, while Trump made $636 million.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
